sections.paragraph:
Original: צהר

Transliteration: tsôhar

Phonetic: tso'-har

BDB Definition:

  1. noon, midday (noun masculine)
    1. noon (as specific time of day)
    2. noon (in simile as bright of happiness, blessing)
  2. roof (noun feminine)
    1. meaning dubious

Origin: from H6671

TWOT entry: 1883a,1883b

Part(s) of speech:
